title: Haiducii
writer: Eugen Barbu, Nicolae Mihail, Mihai Opris
actors: Ion Besoiu, Marga Barbu, Amza Pellea
plot: During the 18th century in the mountains of Wallachia, a band of outlaws aims to undermine the rule of the Phanariots and the Ottomans. Two stepbrothers, Sarbu and Amza, lead this band with their complex and violent relationship.
